name: Comunidad GZ
tagline: Community app with newsletter management and AI chat for Gabi Zimmer
description: A community platform for wine critic Gabriela Zimmer featuring newsletter management with email campaigns via Resend and React Email templates, plus an AI-powered chat assistant built with LangChain and OpenAI. Includes a full admin dashboard for creating, editing, and sending newsletters to subscribers.
highlights: Newsletter management with CRUD and email sending via Resend
HTML email templates built with React Email
AI chat assistant with streaming responses via LangChain and OpenAI
Admin dashboard with data tables for managing newsletters and subscribers
